lks2.objective: Throw accurately to a moving teammate inside a hoop — develop throwing technique and team coordination.
successCriteria: Receiver catches on the full or after one bounce
Team collects hoops together — no solo runs

uks2.objective: Coordinate as a team — choose throw type, time the run into the hoop, and adapt to blockers under pressure.
successCriteria: Throw type matches distance (over- or under-arm)

space.description: Throwing line at one end. Hoops spread out at random distances in front of the line. Teams behind the line.

steps: Split the class into teams of 4–5.
Spread hoops out randomly in front of the throwing line.
One child from each team runs to any hoop while a teammate throws the ball to them.
If the ball is caught on the full or off ONE bounce, the team collects that hoop.
Play until all hoops have been collected — most hoops wins.
questions: What strategies can you come up with as a team?
How do you use your body to make your throw more accurate?
What determines whether you should throw over- or under-arm?

step.space: Move the hoops further from the throwing line
step.task: Determine the type of pass to be used (over-arm only, chest pass, etc.)
step.people: Have blockers who can move between the hoops
